raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN u.start_date IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1 THEN '< 1 year'
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 2 THEN '1-2 years'
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 3 THEN '2-3 years'
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 5 THEN '3-5 years'
        ELSE '5+ years'
    END AS tenure_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS total_submissions,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Processed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processed,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
GROUP BY tenure_bucket
ORDER BY 
    CASE tenure_bucket
        WHEN '< 1 year' THEN 1
        WHEN '1-2 years' THEN 2
        WHEN '2-3 years' THEN 3
        WHEN '3-5 years' THEN 4
        WHEN '5+ years' THEN 5
        ELSE 6
    END;
template:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN u.start_date IS NULL THEN ?s
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS tenure_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS total_submissions,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS processed,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
GROUP BY tenure_bucket
ORDER BY 
    CASE tenure_bucket
        WHEN ?s THEN ?n
        WHEN ?s THEN ?n
        WHEN ?s THEN ?n
        WHEN ?s THEN ?n
        WHEN ?s THEN ?n
        ELSE ?n
    END;

            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1 THEN '< 1 year'
            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 2 THEN '1-2 years'
            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 3 THEN '2-3 years'
            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 5 THEN '3-5 years'

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN u.start_date IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1 THEN '< 1 year'
        ELSE '1+ years'
    END AS tenure_group,
    e.category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
GROUP BY tenure_group, e.category
ORDER BY tenure_group, decline_rate_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    e.short_description,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct,
    AVG(e.amount) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
WHERE e.category = 'Travel'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1
GROUP BY e.short_description
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY decline_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT 
    e.short_description,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct,
    AVG(e.amount) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
WHERE e.category = ?s
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n
GROUP BY e.short_description
HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
ORDER BY decline_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN e.amount < 1000 THEN '< $1k'
        WHEN e.amount < 2000 THEN '$1k-2k'
        WHEN e.amount < 3000 THEN '$2k-3k'
        WHEN e.amount < 5000 THEN '$3k-5k'
        ELSE '$5k+'
    END AS amount_bucket,
    CASE 
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1 THEN '< 1 year'
        ELSE '1+ years'
    END AS tenure_group,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY amount_bucket, tenure_group
ORDER BY tenure_group,
    CASE amount_bucket
        WHEN '< $1k' THEN 1
        WHEN '$1k-2k' THEN 2
        WHEN '$2k-3k' THEN 3
        WHEN '$3k-5k' THEN 4
        ELSE 5
    END;
template:

        WHEN e.amount < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN e.amount < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN e.amount < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN e.amount < ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS amount_bucket,
    CASE 
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS tenure_group,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY amount_bucket, tenure_group
ORDER BY tenure_group,
    CASE amount_bucket
        WHEN ?s THEN ?n
        WHEN ?s THEN ?n
        WHEN ?s THEN ?n
        WHEN ?s THEN ?n
        ELSE ?n
    END;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    dept,
    tenure_group,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        e.department AS dept,
        CASE 
            WHEN u.start_date IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1 THEN '< 1 year'
            ELSE '1+ years'
        END AS tenure_group
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
) sub
WHERE tenure_group = '< 1 year'
GROUP BY dept, tenure_group
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY decline_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    dept,
    tenure_group,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        e.department AS dept,
        CASE 
            WHEN u.start_date IS NULL THEN ?s
            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n THEN ?s
            ELSE ?s
        END AS tenure_group
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
) sub
WHERE tenure_group = ?s
GROUP BY dept, tenure_group
HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
ORDER BY decline_rate_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    dept,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        e.department AS dept,
        e.category AS category,
        e.amount AS amount,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) AS tenure_years
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
) sub
WHERE tenure_years < 1
  AND dept IN ('Development', 'Finance', 'HR')
GROUP BY dept, category
ORDER BY dept, decline_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    dept,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        e.department AS dept,
        e.category AS category,
        e.amount AS amount,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) AS tenure_years
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
) sub
WHERE tenure_years < ?n
  AND dept IN (?s, ?s, ?s)
GROUP BY dept, category
ORDER BY dept, decline_rate_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    months_since_hire,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / (30.0 * 86400))::int AS months_since_hire
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1
) sub
WHERE months_since_hire BETWEEN 0 AND 11
GROUP BY months_since_hire
ORDER BY months_since_hire;
template:
SELECT 
    months_since_hire,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / (?n * ?n))::int AS months_since_hire
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n
) sub
WHERE months_since_hire BETWEEN ?n AND ?n
GROUP BY months_since_hire
ORDER BY months_since_hire;

predicates: ((e.opened_at >= u.start_date) AND (EXTRACT(year FROM age(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < '1'::numeric) AND ((floor((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 2592000.0)))::integer >= 0) AND ((floor((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 2592000.0)))::integer <= 11))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    e.category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(e.amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
  AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
  AND FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / (30.0 * 86400))::int = 0
GROUP BY e.category
ORDER BY decline_rate_pct DESC;
template:

    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct,

GROUP BY e.category

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    days_since_hire,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)::int AS days_since_hire
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
      AND FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / (30.0 * 86400))::int = 0
) sub
WHERE days_since_hire BETWEEN 0 AND 29
GROUP BY days_since_hire
ORDER BY days_since_hire;
template:
SELECT 
    days_since_hire,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / ?n)::int AS days_since_hire
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
      AND FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / (?n * ?n))::int = ?n
) sub
WHERE days_since_hire BETWEEN ?n AND ?n
GROUP BY days_since_hire
ORDER BY days_since_hire;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    days_since_hire,
    e.short_description,
    e.category,
    e.state,
    e.amount,
    e.source_id
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.*,
        FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)::int AS days_since_hire
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
) sub
WHERE days_since_hire BETWEEN 0 AND 4
ORDER BY days_since_hire, state
LIMIT 30;

    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
) sub
WHERE days_since_hire BETWEEN ?n AND ?n
ORDER BY days_since_hire, state
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN source_id IS NULL THEN 'No source_id' ELSE 'Has source_id' END AS source_status,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_21
GROUP BY source_status, category
ORDER BY source_status, decline_rate_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    ci,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.ci,
        e.state,
        FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)::int AS days_since_hire
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
) sub
WHERE days_since_hire BETWEEN 0 AND 4
GROUP BY ci
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
ORDER BY decline_rate_pct DESC, total DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT 
    ci,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.ci,
        e.state,
        FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / ?n)::int AS days_since_hire
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
) sub
WHERE days_since_hire BETWEEN ?n AND ?n
GROUP BY ci
HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
ORDER BY decline_rate_pct DESC, total DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    u.name,
    u.department,
    u.start_date::date AS hire_date,
    COUNT(*) AS submissions_in_first_5_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
  AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
  AND FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)::int BETWEEN 0 AND 4
GROUP BY u.name, u.department, u.start_date
ORDER BY declined DESC, submissions_in_first_5_days DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN u.manager IS NULL THEN 'No Manager' ELSE 'Has Manager' END AS manager_status,
    CASE 
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1 THEN '< 1 year'
        ELSE '1+ years'
    END AS tenure_group,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY manager_status, tenure_group
ORDER BY tenure_group, decline_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN u.manager IS NULL THEN ?s ELSE ?s END AS manager_status,
    CASE 
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS tenure_group,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY manager_status, tenure_group
ORDER BY tenure_group, decline_rate_pct DESC;

CASE WHEN (EXTRACT(year FROM age(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < '1'::numeric) THEN '< 1 year'::text ELSE '1+ years'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    days_bucket,
    CASE WHEN short_description ILIKE '%automatically%' OR short_description ILIKE '%auto%' OR short_description ILIKE '%generated%' THEN 'Auto-generated' ELSE 'Manual' END AS entry_type,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        e.short_description,
        CASE 
            WHEN FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)::int BETWEEN 0 AND 4 THEN 'Days 0-4'
            ELSE 'Days 5+'
        END AS days_bucket
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1
) sub
GROUP BY days_bucket, entry_type
ORDER BY days_bucket, decline_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    days_bucket,
    CASE WHEN short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s OR short_description ILIKE ?s THEN ?s ELSE ?s END AS entry_type,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        e.short_description,
        CASE 
            WHEN FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / ?n)::int BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN ?s
            ELSE ?s
        END AS days_bucket
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n
) sub
GROUP BY days_bucket, entry_type
ORDER BY days_bucket, decline_rate_pct DESC;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (((floor((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)))::integer >= 0) AND ((floor((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)))::integer <= 4)) THEN 'Days 0-4'::text ELSE 'Days 5+'::text END

CASE WHEN ((e.short_description ~~* '%automatically%'::text) OR (e.short_description ~~* '%auto%'::text) OR (e.short_description ~~* '%generated%'::text)) THEN 'Auto-generated'::text ELSE 'Manual'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    days_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS total_submissions,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_all_declines
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        CASE 
            WHEN u.start_date IS NULL THEN 'Unknown start'
            WHEN FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)::int BETWEEN 0 AND 4 THEN 'Days 0-4 (onboarding)'
            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1 THEN 'Days 5-364'
            ELSE '1+ years'
        END AS days_bucket
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
) sub
GROUP BY days_bucket
ORDER BY pct_of_all_declines DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    days_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS total_submissions,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END)) OVER (), ?n) AS pct_of_all_declines
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        CASE 
            WHEN u.start_date IS NULL THEN ?s
            WHEN FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / ?n)::int BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN ?s
            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n THEN ?s
            ELSE ?s
        END AS days_bucket
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
) sub
GROUP BY days_bucket
ORDER BY pct_of_all_declines DESC;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (u.start_date IS NULL) THEN 'Unknown start'::text WHEN (((floor((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)))::integer >= 0) AND ((floor((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)))::integer <= 4)) THEN 'Days 0-4 (onboarding)'::text WHEN (EXTRACT(year FROM age(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < '1'::numeric) THEN 'Days 5-364'::text ELSE '1+ years'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN amount END)) AS avg_declined_amount
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        e.category,
        e.amount,
        FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)::int AS days_since_hire
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
      AND FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)::int >= 5
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1
) sub
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY decline_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS declined,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS decline_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN e_state = ?s THEN amount END)) AS avg_declined_amount
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        e.category,
        e.amount,
        FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / ?n)::int AS days_since_hire
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
      AND FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / ?n)::int >= ?n
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < ?n
) sub
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY decline_rate_pct DESC;

predicates: ((e.opened_at >= u.start_date) AND (EXTRACT(year FROM age(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < '1'::numeric) AND ((floor((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)))::integer >= 5))
